methodsAttempted.query: site:uni-saarland.de KI Studium Prüfungen ChatGPT Universität des Saarlandes
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned the central 2025 generative-AI-and-exams PDF, an older ChatGPT PDF, a faculty-level regulation page, a news item, and an inspirations PDF.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uni-saarland.de Datenschutz KI ChatGPT Universität des Saarlandes "KI" "Datenschutz"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned event/news material and certificate pages; no separate central public privacy policy page for AI tools was found.
Plain HTTP fetch of robots.txt and the central PDF confirmed the selected official PDF was publicly reachable and not disallowed for the generic crawler user agent.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found one public central Saarland University generative-AI assessment guidance PDF suitable for claims. Older, faculty-scoped, and event/news official candidates were recorded but not used as evidence.

Do not generalize faculty-only rules to university-wide policy.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen

artifacts.claimText: Saarland University guidance says using generative AI as an aid for coursework and examinations is generally allowed, but instructors or examiners may restrict it to certain functions or prohibit it entirely.

citation.citationTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen

artifacts.sourceTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Generell gilt: Die Verwendung generativer KI als Hilfsmittel zur Erbringung von Studien- und Prüfungsleistungen ist grundsätzlich erlaubt. Die Verwendung kann jedoch von der/dem Dozierenden bzw. Prüfenden auf bestimmte Funktionen beschränkt oder gänzlich untersagt werden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: In general, generative AI may be used as an aid for coursework and examinations, but instructors or examiners may restrict or prohibit it.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF page 1, section 'Wie kann generative KI im Kontext von Prüfungen verwendet werden?'
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow claim directly supported by the central 2025 official guidance PDF.

artifacts.claimText: Saarland University guidance says generative AI should have the status of an aid and must not replace students' own work; assessment requirements should ensure significant student contribution.

citation.citationTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Entscheidend ist, dass generative KI den Stellenwert von Hilfsmitteln innehaben und die Eigenleistung der Studierenden keinesfalls ersetzt. Leistungsanforderungen sind so zu gestalten, dass bei der Leistungserbringung eine signifikante Eigenleistung der Studierenden sichergestellt ist.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidance treats generative AI as an aid and says it must not replace students' own work; assessments should ensure significant student contribution.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF page 1, section 'Wie kann generative KI im Kontext von Prüfungen verwendet werden?'
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved because the claim follows the PDF language about Hilfsmittel and Eigenleistung without adding broader restrictions.

artifacts.claimText: Saarland University guidance says unauthorized use of generative AI in coursework or examinations, or failure to document it when required, is deception and may invalidate coursework or examinations and, in serious cases, lead to loss of examination entitlement.

citation.citationTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Wird generative KI unerlaubt beim Erbringen von Studien- oder Prüfungsleistungen eingesetzt und/oder wird der Einsatz von diesen entgegen entsprechender Anforderung nicht adäquat gekennzeichnet und dokumentiert, handelt es sich um eine Täuschung, welche zur Ungültigkeit von Prüfungs- und Studienleistungen und in schweren Fällen zum Verlust des Prüfungsanspruchs führen kann.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Unauthorized use, or inadequate documentation when required, is treated as deception and can invalidate assessments or lead to loss of examination entitlement in serious cases.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF page 2, section 'Was passiert bei unerlaubter Verwendung generativer KI?'
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a direct academic-integrity claim using the source's Täuschung wording.

artifacts.claimText: Saarland University guidance says explicit documentation of generative AI use is generally not required beyond the declaration of independent work, but examiners may set transparent written documentation requirements in advance.

citation.citationTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Grundsätzlich ist keine explizite Dokumentation der Verwendung erforderlich und die Angaben zur Art der Verwendung im Rahmen der Eigenständigkeitserklärung sind ausreichend. Ein*e Prüfer*in kann dessen ungeachtet aber zur Nachvollziehung des Lern-Prüfungsprozesses im Vorfeld transparent und schriftlich die Notwendigkeit der Kenntlichmachung formulieren.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Explicit documentation is generally not required beyond the declaration of independent work, but examiners may set transparent written documentation requirements in advance.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF page 2, section 'Wie ist die Verwendung generativer KI zu dokumentieren?'
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Saarland University guidance identifies Microsoft Copilot Chat and HAWKI as available platforms, says HAWKI meets the university's data-protection requirements, and states that ChatGPT is not provided by the university so users are responsible for considering data-protection aspects themselves.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Handreichung LS: Umgang mit generativer KI im Kontext von Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: An der Universität des Saarlandes stehen folgende Plattformen zur Verfügung: Microsoft Copilot Chat ... HAWKI ... Sie stellen eine Alternative zu kommerziellen KI-Tools dar und entsprechen den datenschutzrechtlichen Anforderungen der Universität. Zusätzlich ist das Sprachmodell ChatGPT von OpenAI bekannt und weit verbreitet. Es wird jedoch nicht von der Universität bereitgestellt.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidance lists Microsoft Copilot Chat and HAWKI as available platforms, says HAWKI meets university data-protection requirements, and says ChatGPT is not university-provided.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: PDF page 3, section 'Verfügbarkeit generativer KI an der UdS'
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow platform/data-handling claim from the central guidance; it does not claim ChatGPT is banned.

artifacts.title: Saarland University generative AI assessment guidance staged review
artifacts.summary: Staged review found an official Saarland University March 2025 guidance PDF on generative AI and examinations. The staged claims cover permitted AI use with examiner limits, student own-work boundaries, unauthorized or undocumented use as deception, documentation expectations, and available platforms/data-protection notes. Older, faculty-scoped, and event/news official candidates were rejected or skipped.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Faculty-specific Saarland pages were not generalized to university-wide claims.
The staged output is agent-reviewed only and is not a canonical public release.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
